text.title: GitHub Actions — Basics Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on existing CI maturity + test availability.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: draft-trigger-and-permissions
step.action: Pick events, add filters, declare scoped permissions.

step.name: compose-canonical-job
step.action: Checkout → setup → cache → install → run; pin actions.

step.name: owner-comment-validate
step.action: Add owner comment + changelog; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
